name: Reliance SBI Card
exclusions: upi payments for selected accelerated Reliance categories
transactions excluded under Reliance SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Reliance Retail voucher worth Rs 500 on annual spends of Rs 25,000 at eligible Reliance formats
Reliance Retail voucher worth Rs 750 on annual spends of Rs 50,000 at eligible Reliance formats
Reliance Retail voucher worth Rs 1,000 on annual spends of Rs 80,000 at eligible Reliance formats
Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 1 lakh or more
additionalBenefits: Reliance Retail voucher worth Rs 500 as activation or welcome benefit
Additional Reliance discount vouchers worth up to Rs 3,200 at participating Reliance brands
10 Reward Points per Rs 100 on AJIO and JioMart online spends, except UPI payments
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 at other participating Reliance Retail stores, except UPI payments
5 Reward Points per Rs 100 on dining and movies
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible retail purchases
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions, capped as per product terms
